name: Trust OCI Deployer CA
description: Installs the proxvex CA into the container's system trust store so apps (e.g. Gitea, which verifies the Zitadel discovery URL) trust internal HTTPS services signed by it. Reads the cert from /etc/ssl/addon/chain.pem (written by addon-ssl when ssl.needs_ca_cert=true). Apps using addon-oidc against a TLS-protected zitadel must therefore also enable addon-ssl with ssl.needs_ca_cert=true.
